title: IBM plunges 22% on Wall Street after cutting revenue forecasts due to AI spending
summary: The shift in investment towards artificial intelligence infrastructure drags down traditional software sales and triggers the biggest drop since 1987.

title: U.S. inflation falls more than expected in June, dropping to 3.5%
summary: The U.S. consumer price index recorded its biggest drop in six years, easing pressure on the Federal Reserve.

title: Oil soars to $87 on military escalation in the Gulf and threat to the Strait of Hormuz
summary: Attacks on tankers and U.S. bombings in Iran push crude up 22% in two weeks.

title: Fed President Warsh says he will not tolerate persistently high inflation
summary: Warsh committed to Congress to leave behind the inflationary spike of the last five years.

title: JP Morgan posts record profit in second quarter, but Dimon warns of growing risks
summary: The largest U.S. bank beats expectations with a 41% jump in profits, though its CEO warns of geopolitical and economic uncertainty.

title: Wells Fargo beats profit forecasts driven by interest income and trading
summary: The bank benefits from a healthy economic environment and strong trading business.

title: Bank of America posts 26% profit rise in second quarter, beating estimates
summary: Bank of America records a significant increase in profits thanks to the solid economic environment.

title: Goldman Sachs earns $6.63 billion in second quarter, up 78%, beating forecasts
summary: The investment bank benefits from strong investment banking and higher fees from mergers and IPOs.

title: Wall Street bank stocks trade mixed despite strong quarterly results
summary: The market reacts divergently to the major banks' earnings reports, which overall exceed expectations.

title: ECB selects 36 payment providers for digital euro pilot project
summary: The initiative advances with the inclusion of entities critical of the project, while concrete functionalities are defined.

title: Evotec cuts its forecasts, causing its stock to plummet
summary: The German biotechnology company reduces its earnings outlook, negatively impacting its valuation.

title: SK Hynix considers US IPO via American Depositary Receipts
summary: The South Korean chipmaker aims to capitalize on the industry's boom and investor demand.

title: Airlines like Frontier bet on Starlink to offer in-flight connectivity and attract passengers
summary: SpaceX's satellite internet service expands in commercial aviation as a competitive edge.

title: Ibex 35 falls 0.40% to 19,258 points, pressured by oil
summary: The rise in oil and geopolitical tensions drag on the Spanish stock market, which eases losses after the inflation data.

title: Indra leads Ibex gains with positive recommendations from Morgan Stanley
summary: The Spanish tech company rises 2% and analysts see an opportunity following its recent drop.

title: European stocks ease losses thanks to U.S. inflation data
summary: European indexes narrow losses after the slowdown in U.S. consumer prices is announced.

title: Wall Street falls and U.S. bonds decline amid escalation with Iran
summary: Rising military tensions in the Gulf and the consequent oil rally create risk aversion.

title: Wall Street futures rise after surprising June inflation data
summary: The consumer price index, lower than expected, fuels hopes of a less aggressive Fed.

title: Oil surge sends UK borrowing costs soaring and rattles markets
summary: Crude oil reaches $87 and pushes British debt yields to highs since May.

title: Germany subjects Google's AI summaries to media law and Apple faces lawsuit over artificial intelligence
summary: European regulators step up scrutiny of major tech companies' AI applications.
